arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits Manchester United struggles have taken toll on him
arts.sum: United will head to Anfield on Sunday on a run of four straight defeats.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'too anxious, too afraid' - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United's players are sometimes "too anxious, too afraid to play football" on the pitch, says boss Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: 'He didn't come' - Arne Slot sends perfect Real Madrid response after Trent Alexander-Arnold offer
arts.sum: Arne Slot has insisted that Real Madrid don't always get their man after Liverpool rejected their mid-season approach for Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Will Liverpool v Man Utd be postponed? FPL Gameweek 20 latest
arts.sum: The latest on Sunday's fixture at Anfield The post Will Liverpool v Man Utd be postponed? FPL Gameweek 20 latest appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends Real Madrid Trent Alexander-Arnold transfer warning as Liverpool boss reminds Los Blancos of failed attempt to lure Steven Gerrard away from Anfield
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL: Like Gerrard, Alexander-Arnold is a graduate of the Liverpool academy but if he moved to the Spanish capital, he would follow in the footsteps of former Red Steve McManaman.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's Manchester United training plan for Liverpool shows the scale of his task
arts.sum: Man Utd have had three training sessions to prepare for playing Liverpool but Ruben Amorim's priorities show how far they have to go.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot delivers firm response to Liverpool choke discussion ahead of Man Utd visit
arts.sum: Liverpool are runaway Premier League leaders after hitting the ground running in Arne Slot's first season but the manager recognises there is a long way left to go

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes honest Man Utd confession and admits to relegation gamble
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim joked he is already feeling the effects of managing the Red Devils - and revealed his relegation comments were a tactic to motivate his struggling players

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reminds Trent Alexander-Arnold of Steven Gerrard's Liverpool transfer call
arts.sum: Soon-to-be out of contract Trent Alexander-Arnold is the subject of heavy interest from Real Madrid, who have already seen a bid for the England international rejected by Liverpool

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim needs to get over his feud with Alejandro Garnacho and MUST start the Man United talent against Liverpool, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Alejandro Garnacho has not started any of Manchester United 's last six games, but would be one of the first names on my teamsheet at Anfield on Sunday.
